releaseNotes: LLM speed fix: compact prompt for 2B model, max_tokens 256, 180s timeout. Better error messages. Daily Brief verified with real data.

notes: FIXED: LLM was stuck — system prompt was 2000+ tokens, max_tokens was 4096 (took 5-10 min on CPU)
Fix: Compact prompt for native 2B model — under 200 tokens system prompt, max_tokens 256, 180s timeout
Fix: llamaServer truncates system prompt to 800 chars and history to 500 chars per message
Fix: Better error messages — timeout, connection, and not-enabled errors now show actionable text
Fix: Shadow Chat shows specific error (timeout vs not-connected vs generic) instead of generic fallback
Verified: Daily Brief uses real data (stats, consistency score, weakest stat detection) — no LLM needed
Verified: Add Routine pipeline works — protocol added, events fired, quest generation attempted
Verified: Training section starts empty — no dummy protocols, user adds their own
CRITICAL FIX: Quests now persist to localStorage
Removed Daily Tasks section — quests only
Quest engine: only from protocols, habits, books, weak-points
AI persistent memory — knows your name, stats, streak
